configuration.dependency.title: Dependent components
configuration.dependency.failedToGetVers: Failed to get information of new version
configuration.thirdParty.title: Third Party Configurations
configuration.functional.title: Functional configurations
configuration.contact.title: Contact us
configuration.appInfo.title: System information
configuration.appInfo.autoUpdateFails: Auto-Update Fails? Click to download complete installers
configuration.legacyNotice.title: Old install AppData detected
configuration.legacyNotice.description: Starting with 2.3, upgrades wipe the previous install directory; AppData written there by older versions is no longer referenced and can be backed up + deleted to free space.
configuration.dataPath.error.title: Cannot relocate
configuration.dataPath.confirm.copyNote: Existing data will be copied to the new location after restart. Do not power off or kill the process until done.
configuration.dataPath.confirm.useOrMerg: Target folder already contains Bakabase data (version: {{version}}). Pick how to proceed:
configuration.dataPath.confirm.option.us: Flip the pointer to the target. No files copied. Current data stays at the original location and can be cleaned up manually later.
configuration.dataPath.confirm.option.me: Copy current data to the target. Same-name files are overwritten; other files at the target (e.g. caches) are preserved.
configuration.dataPath.confirm.merge.war: Same-name files at the target will be overwritten with current data. Unrelated files are preserved. Confirm to proceed.
configuration.dataPath.confirm.merge.typ: Type the phrase below verbatim to confirm:
configuration.dataPath.confirm.merge.phr: I understand the risk, confirm merge
configuration.dataPath.restart.title: Restart required to complete migration
configuration.dataPath.restart.body: Migration is staged. Bakabase will switch to the new data path on restart.
configuration.dataPath.validation.inside: Cannot place data inside the install directory — starting with 2.3 the previous install directory is wiped on upgrade and any data inside is lost.
configuration.dataPath.validation.circul: Target and current path contain each other.
configuration.dataPath.validation.noWrit: No write permission for the target.
configuration.dataPath.validation.insuff: Insufficient free space on the target disk.
configuration.appInfo.tip.appDataPath: This is where core data files stored and DO NOT change them if not necessary. The logs in [System] - [Logs] are saved in bootstrap_log.* files, they can be safely deleted.
configuration.appInfo.tip.appDataPath.ma: To bring data from a previous install over without changing this path, you can also do it by hand: 1) click the folder icon to open the current directory; 2) fully close Bakabase; 3) copy and overwrite the current directory with the contents of the old AppData; 4) reopen Bakabase.
configuration.appInfo.tip.appDataPath.in: Data kept inside the application install directory is removed when you uninstall Bakabase or run "Repair" from the installer. To keep it, switch the path to a directory outside the install tree first.
configuration.appInfo.tip.anchorPath: Where the app data path's redirect file lives. When you customise the app data path, the app writes a small pointer file here so the next launch knows where to find your data.
configuration.appInfo.tip.dataPath: This is where user files, covers, and other data are stored.
configuration.appInfo.tip.tempFilesPath: This is a directory where temporary files are stored.
configuration.appInfo.tip.logPath: Detailed information which describing the running states of app. You can send log files to developer if the app is not running normally, and you can delete them also if everything is ok.
configuration.appInfo.tip.backupPath: A data backup will be created when using the new version of app first time, you can delete them if everything is ok. You can download the corresponding version of the app and use the backup files to overwrite the App Data Path for data recovery.
configuration.others.title: Other settings
configuration.others.proxy.tip: You can set a proxy for network requests, such as socks5://127.0.0.1:18888
configuration.others.enablePreRelease.ti: Prefer beta version which has new features but less stability
configuration.others.enableTracking.tip: We are using Microsoft Clarity to track anonymous data, which will help us to improve our product experience.
configuration.others.maxParallelism.tip: Degree of parallelism for CPU-intensive operations. Set to 1 for minimum utilization. Leave empty for default (half of CPU cores).
configuration.development.title: Development
configuration.development.tip.configurab: The configurable port range is {{min}}-{{max}}. And you can set it to 0 for auto count.
configuration.development.tip.changesAft: Changes will take effect after restarting the application
configuration.development.tip.portWarnin: Please be careful when setting this value, if you set it to a value that is already in use by another application, our application will not be able to start.
configuration.development.tip.portsInput: Enter ports separated by commas, e.g. 34567, 34568
configuration.development.error.tooManyP: Too many ports. Up to {{max}} ports are supported.
configuration.ai.title: AI / LLM
configuration.ai.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one to get started.
configuration.ai.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
configuration.ai.featureConfigs.descript: Configure provider and model for each AI feature
configuration.ai.feature.defaultConfigWa: Editing global default config. Changes will affect all features using the default.
configuration.ai.usage.title: Usage Statistics
configuration.ai.auditLog.title: Audit Log
configuration.ai.quota.title: Quota
configuration.ai.quota.enableAuditConten: When enabled, request and response summaries will be logged for debugging. Increases storage usage.
configuration.ai.cache.title: Cache
configuration.ai.cache.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all cache?
